description: An ICAO Aviation Safety Inspector requires an altimetry hazard assessment for winter operations in the Northern Hemisphere. Using the safety brief at ~/Desktop/altimetry_safety_brief.txt and the sea level pressure (SLP) climatology dataset at ~/PanoplyData/slp.mon.ltm.nc, generate a Northern Hemisphere SLP map for January. Export the map to ~/Documents/AviationSafety/nh_jan_slp_map.png. Identify the deepest low-pressure system in the Northern Hemisphere for January and calculate the maximum theoretical terrain clearance error based on the formula in the brief. Document your findings in the required format at ~/Documents/AviationSafety/altimetry_hazard_report.txt.
